html:query.declare: <DATOS oi_empresa="2" salida="HTML" oi_liquidacion="1" oi_variable="" report="" l_incluir="1"><ROWS/></DATOS>

GROUP.noreg: No se encontraron registros para los filtros seleccionados.
No se encontraron registros para los filtros seleccionados.
No se encontraron registros para los filtros seleccionados.

qry:select.name: qry_cabecera
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.d_titulo FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION JOIN ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa INNER LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa WHERE LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAMIN:@oi_liquidacion} {%? (#PARAMIN:@l_simulacion!='') {% AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.l_simulacion = {%= #PARAMIN:@l_simulacion %} %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_variables
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, LIQ09_VARIABLES.d_variable FROM LIQ09_VARIABLES WHERE LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_tipo_variable = \'1\' AND LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable IN (SELECT LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.oi_variable FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, LIQ25_VAL_VAREN, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION JOIN LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq INNER LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.oi_personal_liq, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion INNER LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {%=#PARAMIN:@oi_liquidacion%} {%? (#PARAMIN:@l_simulacion!='') {% AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.l_simulacion = {%= #PARAMIN:@l_simulacion %} %} {% %} %} GROUP BY LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.oi_variable)
{%? (string(#PARAMIN:ROWS/ROW/@id)!='') {% AND LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable in ({%=string(#PARAMIN:ROWS/ROW/@id) %}) %} {% %} %}
UNION
SELECT LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, LIQ09_VARIABLES.d_variable FROM LIQ09_VARIABLES WHERE LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_tipo_variable = \'10\' AND LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable IN (SELECT LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.oi_variable FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, LIQ25_VAL_VARPN, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION JOIN LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq INNER LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.oi_personal_liq, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion INNER LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {%=#PARAMIN:@oi_liquidacion%} {%? (#PARAMIN:@l_simulacion!='') {% AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.l_simulacion = {%= #PARAMIN:@l_simulacion %} %} {% %} %} GROUP BY LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.oi_variable)
{%? (string(#PARAMIN:ROWS/ROW/@id)!='') {% AND LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable in ({%=string(#PARAMIN:ROWS/ROW/@id) %}) %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_personas
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT P1.e_numero_legajo AS legajo, PER1.d_ape_y_nom, LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.n_valor, \'\' as e_periodo
FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as L1, LIQ25_VAL_VAREN, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS P1, PER01_PERSONAL as PER1, LIQ09_VARIABLES AS V1, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION AS VL1
JOIN L1.oi_personal_liq INNER LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.oi_personal_liq, P1.oi_personal_emp INNER L1.oi_personal_emp, P1.oi_personal INNER PER1.oi_personal, V1.oi_variable INNER LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.oi_variable, VL1.oi_liquidacion INNER L1.oi_liquidacion
WHERE L1.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAMIN:@oi_liquidacion} AND LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.oi_variable = {#SOURCE:@oi_variable} {%? (#PARAMIN:@l_simulacion!='') {% AND VL1.l_simulacion = {%= #PARAMIN:@l_simulacion %} %} {% %} %}
UNION
SELECT P10.e_numero_legajo AS legajo, PER10.d_ape_y_nom, LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.n_valor, LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.e_periodo
FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ AS L10, LIQ25_VAL_VARPN, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as P10, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER10, LIQ09_VARIABLES AS V10, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION AS VL10
JOIN L10.oi_personal_liq INNER LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.oi_personal_liq, P10.oi_personal_emp INNER L10.oi_personal_emp, P10.oi_personal INNER PER10.oi_personal, V10.oi_variable INNER LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.oi_variable, VL10.oi_liquidacion INNER L10.oi_liquidacion
WHERE L10.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAMIN:@oi_liquidacion} AND LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.oi_variable = {#SOURCE:@oi_variable} {%? (#PARAMIN:@l_simulacion!='') {% AND VL10.l_simulacion = {%= #PARAMIN:@l_simulacion %} %} {% %} %}
ORDER BY legajo ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Variables.VARIABLE\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW
